case_title: STEPFATHER FOR MINOR: BERMUDEZ, RONALD et al VS SANDOVAL, FRANCISCO

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY STEPFATHER FOR MINOR: BERMUDEZ, RONALD DALE, VERONICA: MINOR AS TO DEFENDANT SANDOVAL, FRANCISCO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-15-1993 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 02
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SANDOVAL, FRANCISCO
UNTIMELY SERVICE AS TO FRANCISCO SANDOVAL, NOT SERVED 20 DAYS PRIOR HRG. ON SUBSERVICE.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF STEPFATHER FOR MINOR: BERMUDEZ, RONALD DALE, VERONICA: MINOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SANDOVAL, FRANCISCO $1,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $35.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,035.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT SANDOVAL, FRANCISCO
